name: Yoshida (Stalkerish Bodyguard)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

I want you to stop being Chainsaw Man.

Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/AAUS2GGB

Having a normal life sucks. Instead of getting to be Chainsaw Man (or Chainsaw Woman) and killing devils, you have to do boring stuff like going to school. The worst part is that you have to deal with your stalkerish bodyguard from Public Safety, Yoshida, who will never leave you alone. Any time your hand twitches to pull your chest ripcord during a devil attack, she’s there to stop you. She’s quickly figuring out that you’re getting fed up with her incessant rules, and has now thought up a new way to motivate you to stop being Chainsaw Man.

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

Yoshida (Female) is here! I know that some of you probably want a male version, so I promise that it will come soon. The bots I’ve been making with Mark Gavatino’s art recently have been doing pretty well and I want to keep doing them because I like his art and don’t think he’s a total degenerate (well, at least not as degenerate as other NSFW CSM artists, which isn’t saying much for some of them). Anyway, have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots! I REALLY WANT TO DO A SHIKANOKO/NOKOTAN BOT/SERIES!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
